reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark evidenceStatus=satisfied for the current CLI guide evaluate-observation no-runner claim covered by focused CLI tests, direct packet re-evaluation, and the shipped command catalog.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by focused CLI tests showing `evaluate observation` accepts already-observed packets and does not invoke adapter runner templates, plus a direct packet re-evaluation command that produced a summary from an existing observed packet; the current command catalog exposes `cautilus evaluate observation [args]`.
